session_summary: Implemented LPC Local Asset Builder and Character Creator slot tab UI. All 3 files written and compiling. The builder is currently running in Unity (invoked via Tools > LPC Import > 3). Awaiting completion.
done: Created Assets/_Project/Scripts/Editor/LPCLocalAssetBuilder.cs (614 lines) - static class that scans LPC sprite folders, creates BodyPartData assets, deletes legacy flat assets, rebuilds registry
Updated Assets/_Project/Scripts/Editor/LPCBulkImporterRunner.cs - added MenuItem '3 Build Assets from Local Files'
Updated Assets/_Project/Scripts/UI/Menus/CharacterCreationController.cs - added slot tab bar, body type toggle in BuildAppearancePanel, PopulateSlotTabs(), HighlightActiveTab(), SlotDisplayName()
Added slotTabButtons/populatedSlots lists and TabActive/TabInactive colors
Wired hairPrevButton/hairNextButton as aliases of slotPrevButton/slotNextButton in runtime UI
Updated SwitchActiveSlot to highlight active tab and sync legacy hair index
Updated OnDestroy to clean up tab button listeners
Created beads: iu5l (in_progress), r526 (slot tab UI, blocked by iu5l), so0k (Phase 3 deferred P4)
Fixed array init syntax (added new[] for tuple array) and removed StartAssetEditing that broke SliceSpritesheet
Compilation succeeded - no CS errors in Unity console
remaining: Wait for LPC Local Asset Builder to finish (processing ~1,278 folders with SaveAndReimport per PNG - takes 10-30+ min)
Check Unity console for: '[LPC Local] Complete! Created: X, Updated: Y, Deleted: Z, Errors: W'
If errors, diagnose and fix individual failures
Run Tools > LPC Asset Validator - expect 0 errors
Test character creation: MainMenu > New Game > verify appearance panel shows slot tabs, body type toggle, skin/hair tinting
Verify slot cycling works for all populated slots (Hair, Body, Head, Torso, Legs, Feet, etc.)
Close bead ProjectNameHere-iu5l, then unblock and work on ProjectNameHere-r526
Git commit and push all changes
decisions: LPCLocalAssetBuilder is static class (not EditorWindow) - simpler, called from LPCBulkImporterRunner
No StartAssetEditing/StopAssetEditing - SliceSpritesheet needs synchronous SaveAndReimport
Old-format folders (hair_afro, legs_armour, etc): detected by PNGs directly in top-level dir + prefix matching
New-format folders (Beard/beard_medium_beard_male, etc): detected by subdirs containing PNGs + parent dir name matches BodyPartSlot
Body type from folder name suffix: _male, _female, or universal (old format = always universal)
LPC anim fallbacks: attack1->slash, attack2->thrust, attack3->spellcast/shoot, run->walk
TintCategory: Body/Head=Skin, Hair/Beard=Hair, everything else=None (armor tinting deferred)
Legacy 34 flat assets deleted AFTER new ones created in BodyParts/{Slot}/ subdirs
Shadow slot skipped in tab bar (not user-selectable)
Slot tabs dynamically rebuilt when body type changes (PopulateSlotTabs)
next_steps: 1. Check Unity console for builder completion (may need to wait or re-run if it crashed)
2. If builder completed: check counts, run validator, test in play mode
3. If builder failed/crashed: check error logs, fix LPCLocalAssetBuilder.cs, re-run
4. After builder succeeds: close iu5l, verify slot tab UI (r526), close r526

key_context.slot_enum: BodyPartSlot: WeaponBehind=0, Shadow=1, Body=2, Head=3, Eyes=4, Beard=5, Torso=6, Shoulders=7, Cape=8, Legs=9, Feet=10, Gloves=11, Hair=12, Hat=13, Accessories=14, WeaponFront=15, Shield=16
key_context.folder_structure: Old format: hair_afro/ (PNGs: idle.png, run.png, slash.png, thrust.png, walk.png, hurt.png, jump.png, shoot.png). New format: Beard/beard_medium_beard_male/ (PNGs: idle.png, run.png, attack1.png, attack2.png, attack3.png, etc.)
key_context.legacy_assets: 34 flat .asset files in ScriptableObjects/Character/BodyParts/ root (body_light, head_light, hair_*, legs_*, torso_*, weapon_*)
